# Internet & Software | Evaluation Guide for Online Fraud Solutions

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Explore online fraud prevention solutions with a clear understanding of what your business really needs, from features and standards to essential questions to ask during the platform evaluation process.

Our Internet & Software Evaluation Guide for Online Fraud Solutions includes:

*   A comprehensive breakdown of the most common fraud prevention solutions for Internet and software providers
*   Key questions to guide you in assessing each solution’s capabilities and fit for your business
*   An evaluation checklist designed to help you select an ideal fraud solution tailored to the unique needs and trends of the Internet & Software space
